globalMiCloudHint: Shared MiCloud credentials used by all devices (can be overridden per device).
forceMiCloudHint: Use MiCloud even for devices that support local connection.
ipHint: Local IP address of the device (e.g. 192.168.1.100)
tokenHint: 32-character MiOT token. Use Mi Home app or miot-cli to obtain it.
modelHint: Device model identifier (e.g. dmaker.fan.p5). Leave empty for auto-detect.
micloudOverrideHint: Override global MiCloud credentials for this device only.
pollingIntervalHint: How often to poll the device for updates (milliseconds).
